items.name: Gothic Cat Tail
items.description:
This sleek black feline tail is adorned with intricate silver chains and a gothic cross charm, giving it a mysterious and rebellious edge. Perfect for avatars with a gothic, alternative, or supernatural aesthetic. Add a touch of feline grace and dark allure to your look! ✨🌙

items.name: ARES GEN-3 Exoskeleton [Torso] [Red]
items.description:
The third-generation Augmented Reflex Enhancement System (ARES) is a state-of-the-art exoskeleton frame developed by the BLKT Corporation, widely regarded as one of their flagship military assets. Standard-issue across BLKT's military forces, the exoskeleton has also surfaced repeatedly beyond official channels, rumored to have been funneled into black markets amid the ongoing corporate war.

Complete the set: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=ARES&Category=1&CreatorName=Darkzone+Armory&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&IncludeNotForSale

Check out our other UGC items: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Darkzone%20Armory&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1
